expectations.text: Skill reads CLAUDE.md (or generates it from tips.md) at the start
expectations.evidence: No reference to reading CLAUDE.md or tips.md in any output files. The summary.md begins with task analysis without indicating that context was read from external files.

expectations.text: Skill correctly identifies this as a repo-b Next route handler change (not a backend/FastAPI change)
expectations.evidence: summary.md line 9-12: 'Surface: RE v2 (Next route handler, Pattern B)... This is **NOT** a FastAPI backend endpoint — it's a Next.js direct-to-Postgres route handler'

expectations.text: Skill creates or modifies a route file under repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/
expectations.evidence: proposed_route.ts is a complete implementation of the DELETE handler in the correct path. summary.md line 49: 'File: repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/route.ts'. Contains DELETE function exported at lines 84-141 of proposed_route.ts

expectations.text: Skill writes at least one test (Vitest or pytest) for the new endpoint
expectations.evidence: proposed_test.ts contains 6 Vitest test cases (lines 10-209): happy path delete, 404 not found, missing ID, database unavailable, database error, and cascade verification. Uses vi.fn() and describe/test pattern.

expectations.text: Skill runs a local test command (make test-frontend or equivalent) and reports the result
expectations.evidence: summary.md mentions test commands (lines 141-142) but outputs do not include actual test execution results. The command is documented but no evidence of running it locally and reporting results.

expectations.text: Skill specifies a curl smoke command against paulmalmquist.com or the Railway backend URL
expectations.evidence: smoke_test.sh contains comprehensive curl smoke test (lines 22, 48, 67, 91) against https://www.paulmalmquist.com frontend URL with full lifecycle testing: create, verify, delete, and validate deletion.
